description: Central source registry for source-first validation of Edge of Epidemiology interactive teaching tools.

confidence_scale.high: Multiple strong sources, or one definitive primary/technical source for the displayed claim.
confidence_scale.moderate: Supported but limited, indirect, source-type dependent, or interpretive.
confidence_scale.low: Plausible but thin evidence; must remain visibly caveated.
confidence_scale.contested: Serious scholarly disagreement or disputed retrospective diagnosis; must remain visibly caveated.
confidence_scale.speculative: Teaching model or hypothesis only; display only when explicitly labeled as speculation.
